vertical_queries: {company_name} FDA clearance clinical trial medical device

research_goals: Owner story: years in business, founding thesis, technical background
Revenue signal: size indicators from employee count, facility footprint, contracts
Competitive moat: IP, patents, regulatory approvals, proprietary technology
Regulatory landscape: FDA clearances, EPA permits, state licenses, compliance history
Exit readiness: any mentions of fundraising, strategic review, or sale
Intellectual property: patents filed, trade secrets, proprietary processes
Clinical pipeline: products in development, trials, regulatory milestones
story_hooks: Healthcare and energy assets with defensible IP and regulatory moats are commanding premium valuations from institutional investors.
The convergence of technology and healthcare is creating acquisition opportunities that strategic buyers and PE platforms are competing for aggressively.
synthesis_prompts.market_context: Healthcare and energy M&A activity is driven by secular tailwinds — aging populations, energy transition mandates, and technology convergence — that have attracted record institutional capital to both sectors.
synthesis_prompts.buyer_appetite: Family offices, PE platforms, and strategic acquirers are actively deploying capital into healthcare technology, medical devices, energy infrastructure, and critical minerals — paying premium multiples for assets with regulatory moats and recurring revenue.
synthesis_prompts.premium_driver: The assets commanding the strongest multiples in healthcare and energy share defensible competitive positions: FDA clearances, permitted reserves, long-term contracts, and proprietary technology that create barriers to entry no amount of capital can quickly replicate.

buyer_scoring_criteria.score_8_description: Confirmed prior acquisition in healthcare or energy (must name the deal)
buyer_scoring_criteria.score_6_description: Operates in adjacent sector, no confirmed acquisition

buyer_scoring_criteria.score_8_description: Buyer has regulatory expertise and values IP-protected assets
buyer_scoring_criteria.score_6_description: Buyer operates in regulated industries but different domain
buyer_scoring_criteria.score_4_description: No regulatory experience or IP strategy

buyer_scoring_criteria.score_8_description: Buyer actively investing in seller's geographic market or subsector
buyer_scoring_criteria.score_6_description: Buyer operates in region but different focus

buyer_scoring_criteria.score_8_description: Buyer's confirmed deal range matches seller's estimated enterprise value
buyer_scoring_criteria.score_6_description: Buyer's range overlaps at the edges
buyer_scoring_criteria.score_4_description: Significant mismatch in deal size expectations

growth_levers.description: FDA clearances, EPA permits, and state licenses create multi-year barriers to entry that acquirers value as durable competitive advantages.
Long-term supply agreements, maintenance contracts, and managed services create predictable cash flow that institutional investors underwrite at premium multiples.
Patents, proprietary processes, and trade secrets create defensible market positions that command acquisition premiums.
Products in development, permitted reserves, and regulatory milestones create optionality value beyond current earnings.
AI, IoT, and data analytics capabilities applied to healthcare delivery or energy operations create platform value beyond the core business.

fee_structure.success_fee_description: 3–7% of transaction value, scaled for deal complexity

pipeline_prompts.synthesis_context: You are a senior investment analyst evaluating {buyer_name} as a potential acquirer or co-investor for a healthcare or energy asset. You are writing buyer intelligence for an investment memorandum.
pipeline_prompts.nuggets_context: You are extracting golden nuggets from RAW search results about {buyer_name} for an investment advisory team representing a healthcare or energy company.
pipeline_prompts.nuggets_focus: Why {buyer_name} would want to acquire or invest in a healthcare or energy asset
pipeline_prompts.product_discovery_query: {buyer_name} operates healthcare, medical device, energy, or natural resource businesses that demonstrate strategic acquisition appetite

pipeline_sections.title: M&A Appetite & Deal History
pipeline_sections.topic_template: {buyer_name} has acquired healthcare, medical device, or energy businesses through strategic acquisition or platform build strategies

pipeline_sections.title: Platform Strategy
pipeline_sections.topic_template: {buyer_name} is building a healthcare or energy platform through acquisitions of companies with regulatory moats and proprietary technology

pipeline_sections.title: Regulatory & Compliance Expertise
pipeline_sections.topic_template: {buyer_name} has demonstrated expertise navigating FDA, EPA, or state regulatory frameworks in healthcare or energy

pipeline_sections.title: CEO Vision & Strategy
pipeline_sections.topic_template: {buyer_name} CEO or leadership has discussed growth through acquisition in healthcare, energy, or related sectors

pipeline_sections.title: Strategic Fit
pipeline_sections.topic_template: How {buyer_name}'s existing platform would be strengthened by acquiring a healthcare or energy asset with regulatory moats

pipeline_sections.title: Approach Strategy
pipeline_sections.topic_template: corporate development and investment leadership at {buyer_name} who evaluate acquisitions in healthcare or energy

pipeline_sections.title: Golden Nuggets
pipeline_sections.topic_template: {buyer_name} executives have made statements about acquiring healthcare or energy businesses, building platforms, or expanding into new sectors

pipeline_sections.title: Valuation & Deal Terms
pipeline_sections.topic_template: {buyer_name} has paid specific multiples for healthcare or energy acquisitions or has disclosed deal terms
